summary: Completed comprehensive end-to-end testing of ORBITAL Binary Options Trading Platform. Backend APIs fully functional (17/17 tests passed). Frontend authentication and trading interface working well with minor session management considerations.

integration_issues.issue: JWT tokens appear to expire quickly causing redirects to auth page

passed_tests: User login with JWT authentication working
Admin login with provided credentials working
Market assets endpoint returning 20 assets (forex, crypto, metals)
Real-time prices endpoint working for all asset types
Open trades and trade history endpoints working
Admin stats endpoint providing platform metrics
AI chat endpoint responding with GPT-5.2
Dashboard market display and asset selection
action_item_for_main_agent: Consider reviewing JWT token expiration settings if users experience frequent re-authentication requests. All core functionality is working excellently.
success_percentage: Backend: 100% (17/17), Frontend: ~90% (core flows working, minor session issue)
